will have elevation in his profession. At the same time if Sun's
aspect is also there he will get the special authority in his
elevation. If Moon is also posited along with Jupiter, in addition
. to elevation with authority, he will have change of place or
transfer. Even after getting transferred after promotion, he will
have harassment from higher officers there. If Mars is posited in
2nd to Jupiter the enemies would be there at new place.

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 55
Leaving the present Job and seeking another job:
If natal Moon + ketu are in the 3rd house to natal Saturn
there will be frequent job change. As an example, take the birth
on DOB 28-6-1977, In this horoscope, Saturn is posited in
Kataka, Moon is posited in Vrischika and Ketu is posited in
Meena. All these 3 planets are in one direction North, otherwise
to say they are in I, 5, 9 trines amounting to Saturn+ Moon+
Ketu combination in one sign. With this the native will have
